parameters.jsCode:
const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

Hi ${inv.customerName},

Just a friendly heads up that invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is due on ${inv.dueDate}.

If you've already arranged payment, please disregard this message.

Need to discuss payment options? Just reply to this email.

Best regards,
AnyVision Media
Accounts Department

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `Upcoming: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} due ${inv.dueDate}`, whatsappMessage: `Hi ${inv.customerName}, friendly reminder that invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is due on ${inv.dueDate}. Please disregard if already paid.`, } };

const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

Hi ${inv.customerName},

This is a reminder that invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is due today (${inv.dueDate}).

Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience. If payment has already been made, kindly forward the proof of payment so we can update our records.

Invoice: ${inv.invoiceNumber}
Amount Due: R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}
Due Date: ${inv.dueDate}

Kind regards,
AnyVision Media
Accounts Department

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `Due Today: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} - R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}`, whatsappMessage: `Hi ${inv.customerName}, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is due today (${inv.dueDate}). Please arrange payment or send proof if already paid. Thank you.`, } };

const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

Dear ${inv.customerName},

Our records indicate that invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is now ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue.

We understand that oversights happen, but we kindly request that you settle this outstanding amount as soon as possible.

If there are any issues with the invoice or if you require a payment arrangement, please contact us immediately so we can find a solution.

Invoice: ${inv.invoiceNumber}
Amount Overdue: R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}
Due Date: ${inv.dueDate}
Days Overdue: ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)}

Regards,
AnyVision Media
Accounts Department

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `Overdue: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} - ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days past due`, whatsappMessage: `Dear ${inv.customerName}, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is now ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue. Please arrange payment urgently or contact us to discuss. - AnyVision Media Accounts`, } };

const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

COLLECTIONS NOTICE

Dear ${inv.customerName},

Despite previous reminders, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} remains unpaid and is now ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue.

This invoice has been placed in our collections queue. To avoid further action, please make payment within the next 7 days.

If you are experiencing financial difficulties, we encourage you to contact us immediately to arrange a suitable payment plan.

Invoice: ${inv.invoiceNumber}
Amount Overdue: R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}
Original Due Date: ${inv.dueDate}
Days Overdue: ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)}
Status: Collections Queue

Regards,
AnyVision Media
Accounts Department

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `COLLECTIONS: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} - ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue`, whatsappMessage: `COLLECTIONS NOTICE: ${inv.customerName}, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue and has been placed in collections. Please contact us urgently. - AnyVision Media Accounts`, } };

const inv = $input.first().json; const html = `

AnyVision Media

FINAL NOTICE - MANAGEMENT ESCALATION

Dear ${inv.customerName},

This matter has been escalated to management. Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is now ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue and remains unpaid despite multiple reminders.

Please be advised that if payment is not received within 7 days of this notice, we will be compelled to take further action, which may include suspending services, engaging a collections agency, or pursuing legal remedies.

We strongly urge you to settle this account or contact us immediately to discuss a resolution.

Invoice: ${inv.invoiceNumber}
Amount Overdue: R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)}
Original Due Date: ${inv.dueDate}
Days Overdue: ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)}
Status: Escalated to Management
Reminders Sent: ${inv.reminderCount}

Regards,
AnyVision Media
Management

AnyVision Media | Johannesburg, South Africa | accounts@anyvisionmedia.com

`; return { json: { ...inv, emailHtml: html, emailSubject: `FINAL NOTICE: Invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} - Escalated to Management`, emailCc: 'ian@anyvisionmedia.com', whatsappMessage: `FINAL NOTICE: ${inv.customerName}, invoice ${inv.invoiceNumber} for R ${parseFloat(inv.balanceDue).toFixed(2)} is ${Math.abs(inv.daysPastDue)} days overdue. This has been escalated to management. Please contact us within 7 days to avoid further action. - AnyVision Media Management`, } };

value.Description: ={{ 'Escalation: Invoice ' + $json.invoiceNumber + ' - ' + $json.customerName + '. R ' + $json.balanceDue + ' is ' + Math.abs($json.daysPastDue) + ' days overdue. ' + $json.reminderCount + ' reminders sent. Escalated to management.' }}

value.Action Taken: ={{ 'Sent ' + $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.reminderStage + ' reminder via ' + ($('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.preferredChannel || 'Email') }}
value.Metadata JSON: ={{ JSON.stringify({ stage: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.reminderStage, tone: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.reminderTone, daysPastDue: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.daysPastDue, reminderCount: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.reminderCount + 1, channel: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.preferredChannel, customer: $('Determine Reminder Stage').first().json.customerName }) }}

value.Description: ={{ 'Dispute: Invoice ' + $('Handle Dispute').first().json.invoiceNumber + ' - ' + $('Handle Dispute').first().json.customerName + '. Reason: ' + $('Handle Dispute').first().json.disputeReason + '. Details: ' + ($('Handle Dispute').first().json.disputeDetails || '') }}

value.Metadata JSON: ={{ JSON.stringify({ reason: $('Handle Dispute').first().json.disputeReason, owner: $('Handle Dispute').first().json.disputeOwner, priority: $('Handle Dispute').first().json.priority, customer: $('Handle Dispute').first().json.customerName }) }}

parameters.subject: =ACCOUNTING ERROR - WF-02 Collections - {{ $json.execution.error.message }}
parameters.message:
=

Accounting Department Error - WF-02 Collections

Workflow: {{ $json.workflow.name }}

Error: {{ $json.execution.error.message }}

Node: {{ $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted }}

Time: {{ $now.toISO() }}

View Execution

parameters.content:
## WF-02: Collections & Follow-ups

**Daily 7AM Run:**
1. Reads all open/overdue invoices from Airtable
2. Loops through each invoice
3. Looks up customer details
4. Determines reminder stage based on days relative to due date
5. Builds appropriate HTML email + WhatsApp message
6. Sends via preferred channel
7. Updates invoice reminder tracking
8. Logs to audit trail

**Stages:** T-3 (friendly) | Due (reminder) | T+3 (firm) | T+7 (collections) | T+14 (escalation)

## Dispute Handling

POST /accounting/dispute

Accepts: {invoice_number, reason, details, customer_name, customer_email}

1. Parses dispute and assigns owner based on reason
2. Updates invoice status to Disputed
3. Creates Dispute Resolution task
4. Writes DISPUTE_OPENED audit log entry

## Error Handling

Catches any unhandled errors and sends notification email to ian@anyvisionmedia.com.
